market.macro_notes_md: JULY 14 2026 MIDDAY UPDATE: CPI COOL PRINT CHANGES THE PICTURE. June CPI: Headline 3.5% YoY vs 3.8% expected (monthly -0.4% sa vs -0.2% expected). Core 2.6% vs 2.8% expected. This is the most significant dovish macro development YTD — September rate hike probability dropping sharply; September rate cut back on the table. Impact: (1) Growth names (AMD, META, PLTR) see discount rate relief — Nasdaq +0.81%. (2) Financial stocks benefit from lower rates and record Q2 earnings (GS +7.7%). (3) IBM -22% on Q2 earnings warning — isolated event, not macro-driven. Enterprise consulting weakness from customers prioritizing hardware over software. (4) Iran Hormuz blockade continues (Brent $85+) but CPI data showed gasoline contribution declining — oil price spike not accelerating. Warsh Congressional testimony ongoing — tone is key for afternoon session. Kevin Warsh inaugural testimony. UPCOMING: BlackRock July 15 (pre-market). Netflix July 16 (AH). AMD Advancing AI 2026 conference July 22-23.

memory.recent_lessons_md:
## 2026-07-14 (Tuesday)
**3 things that worked:**
1. CPI cool print (+0.21 pp outperformance today) — AMD semiconductor rebound correctly anticipated
2. IBM non-entry: API blockage saved us from IBM -22% crash (Q2 earnings warning). IBM was scored 7.0 and would have been entered. Lesson: upcoming binary events within 1 week are underweighted in current Fundamentals scoring.
3. GS/META price correction: Midday routine caught stale pre-market prices ($645→$1,075 for GS, $603→$660 for META) before guardrail-violating sizes were committed.
**3 things to improve tomorrow:**
1. Market-Open routine must fire: AMD 24+ days naked. Any route to placing a stop requires Market-Open execution.
2. GS/META entries MUST execute: Day 2 of binding commitment. Operator must manually place at app.alpaca.markets before or at July 15 open if API still blocked.
3. AMD reduction non-negotiable: SELL 9sh AMD at July 15 MOO (first order, before any other action).

## 2026-07-13 (Monday)
API blocked 76th+ session. 5 of 7 routines silently failed. All orders blocked. AMD naked Day 22+. CPI June 2026 was the key risk event for July 14. IBM EXIT DEADLINE July 17 noted.
